title: Traditional Ukrainian Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and savory dish from Ukraine featuring lamb kebabs, marinated in a blend of spices and herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together oil, onion, garlic, parsley, dill, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated lamb onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the lamb kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Transfer the kebabs to a serving platter and garnish with chopped red pepper.
